mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_TBL (WRITER_ID, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_THUMB, MEMBER_NICKNAME, BOARD_STATUS) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{marketTitle}, #{marketContent}, #{productThumb}, #{memberNickname}, 0)

INSERT INTO STORE_BOARD_TBL (BOARD_NO, MEMBER_ID, CTPVSGG_ID, MARKET_TITLE, MARKET_CONTENT, PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCT_THUMB, PRODUCT_STATUS, TRADE_TYPE) VALUES (#{boardNo}, #{memberId}, #{ctpvsggId}, #{marketTitle}, #{marketContent}, #{productPrice}, #{productThumb}, #{productStatus}, #{tradeType})
mapper.select: SELECT MARKET_NO, BOARD_NO, MEMBER_ID, CTPVSGG_ID, MARKET_TITLE, MARKET_CONTENT, PRODUCT_STATUS, PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCT_THUMB, READ_COUNT, IS_DELETED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, TRADE_TYPE FROM STORE_BOARD_TBL WHERE IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY MARKET_NO DESC

SELECT MARKET_NO, BOARD_NO, MEMBER_ID, CTPVSGG_ID, MARKET_TITLE, MARKET_CONTENT, PRODUCT_STATUS, PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCT_THUMB, READ_COUNT, IS_DELETED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, TRADE_TYPE FROM STORE_BOARD_TBL WHERE MARKET_NO = #{marketNo} AND IS_DELETED = 0
